audio_direction.mood: Mysterious, dreamy, pulse-driven with an undercurrent of noir tension. The soundscape feels organic yet surreal—like a midnight jazz speakeasy tangled in glowing roots.
audio_direction.palette: Muted electric pianos, soft brushed jazz drums, upright bass (synthetic), sparse neon-glassy mallet tones, filtered noise as cave ambience, gentle e-piano chords, grainy synth pads for atmosphere, bioluminescent 'ping' accents. All sounds should shimmer, echo, or pulse, evoking neon-lit mycelium and secretive underground life.
audio_direction.reference_vibe: Imagine Angelo Badalamenti’s Twin Peaks with a twist of lo-fi jazz and synth, mixed with the bioluminescent whimsy of Gris and the rhythmical tension of a noir club at 2AM.

music.mood: Dreamy noir lounge—calm, mysterious, slightly melancholic, inviting investigation.
music.key_scale: D minor jazz (D Dorian, add chromatic passing tones)
music.procedural_hint: Generate a 4-bar loop: e-piano plays ii-V-i in D minor (Em7b5 - A7b9 - Dm9), syncopate chords gently. Add upright bass: root-walk with swung timing. Overlay soft triangle wave mallet notes (randomized arpeggio on Dm9). Light brushed drum: snare rim on 2/4, hi-hat tick 8th notes. Optionally, fade in subtle filtered white noise as cavern air.

music.mood: Moody, grooving, subtly tense but hypnotic. Keeps player in a jazz-flow state.
music.procedural_hint: Eight-bar loop: Electric piano comping Gm7 (i), Cm7 (iv), D7alt (V), with short 7th/9th voicings. Syncopate with swung 16th-note hi-hat pattern and deep, synthetic upright bass walking G–F–E-flat–D. Add triangle or sine lead: slow call-and-response melody (three notes per bar, echo/reverb). Intermittent 'spore ping' accents: short, glassy sine pings at random beats.

music.mood: Triumphant yet mysterious—like solving a riddle in a moonlit club.
music.procedural_hint: 4-bar phrase: Major 7th e-piano arpeggio (Cmaj7 - G13 - Dm9 - Fmaj7). Accent with short, upward sine glissando (400→900Hz, 0.3s), jazz brush stinger (snare+ride), and a sparkling mallet run (random notes C–E–G–B with reverb). All instruments fade quickly for a clean, hopeful finish.

music.mood: Somber, unresolved, gently dissonant—captures a noir setback without harshness.
music.procedural_hint: 2-bar phrase: Low sine bass drones on F#-G, e-piano plays clusters (F#min7b5, G7alt); add single, echoing triangle note (F#) at the end. White noise 'hiss' swell (0.6s, fade out), simulating the city dimming.

sfx.when: When player connects 3+ glowing fungal tiles (basic match).
sfx.feel: Soft, glassy, bioluminescent ping—rewarding and organic, evoking spores lighting up.
sfx.synth_recipe: waveform: sine; freq: 600Hz->1000Hz upward slide; duration: 0.18s; envelope: fast attack (0.01s), short decay (0.06s), smooth release (0.11s); add subtle stereo delay (40ms); lowpass filter at 2.2kHz for roundness.

sfx.when: Any UI button tap (menus, dialogs, abilities).
sfx.feel: Crisp, minimal, tactile—a dry yet organic click with subtle jazz flavor.
sfx.synth_recipe: waveform: triangle; freq: 850Hz; duration: 0.09s; envelope: instant attack (0), decay 0.02s, release 0.07s; add very light velocity-randomization; optionally overlay weak filtered noise burst (30ms).

sfx.when: Spawn or match of a special tile (e.g. Evidence Mushroom, Jazz Note Spore).
sfx.feel: Magical, twinkly, mysterious—like a neon droplet echoing in a cavern.
sfx.synth_recipe: waveform: sine; freq: 1100Hz, then quick arpeggio 1100-1400-1700Hz (3 notes, 0.03s apart); total duration: 0.18s; envelope: attack 0.02s, decay 0.06s, release 0.10s; reverb tail (short, 0.15s); wet level 50%.

sfx.feel: Bright, lush, uplifting resonance—like a room lighting up with jazz applause.
sfx.synth_recipe: waveform: sine+triangle (mixed); freq: C5-E5-G5 (chord, 3 notes triggered at once); duration: 0.35s; envelope: attack 0.01s, decay 0.12s, release 0.22s; add gentle stereo chorus effect; quick white noise burst (40ms) for sparkle.

sfx.when: Level fails (out of moves, darkness overcomes the grid).
sfx.feel: Soft, minor, dissolving—like a memory fading in a jazz-blue mist.
sfx.synth_recipe: waveform: sine; freq: 560Hz->300Hz downward slide; duration: 0.28s; envelope: attack 0.02s, decay 0.08s, release 0.18s; wet reverb (cave); lowpass filter at 1.2kHz for muffled tone.

sfx.when: Player activates a booster or power-up.
sfx.feel: Energetic, jazzy flourish—evokes improvisational jazz runs powering up.
sfx.synth_recipe: waveform: sine+triangle; freq: fast arpeggio (G4-B4-D5-F#5, 0.04s each); total duration: 0.16s; envelope: attack 0, decay 0.04s, release 0.12s; add subtle echo (delay 25ms); finish with a quick filtered noise sweep (lowpass 700->2.5kHz, 0.08s).

mix.master_feel: Balanced, dreamy, and slightly lo-fi. Music is present but never drowns out SFX. SFX sit close to the player, music and ambience are slightly pushed back, with a wet, cave-y reverb overall. Avoid harsh highs; favor mellow mids and round lows.
mix.ducking: All SFX (match, win, special element, booster) trigger a sidechain duck on music (-6dB, 150ms attack, 300ms release) to ensure clarity of feedback.
mix.haptics: Vibration on: match (light tap, 20ms), booster (medium tap, 35ms), win (rapid short burst, 2x15ms spaced), lose (long single vibration, 60ms, soft). Never for UI taps.
